name: IdsClmAllDel

text.value: WITH delRows AS (SELECT CLM_ID, SRC_SYS_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.B74_TMP_IdsClmAllDel) DELETE T FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.@{pipeline().parameters.TableName} T JOIN delRows R ON T.CLM_ID = R.CLM_ID AND T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = R.SRC_SYS_CD_SK; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.B74_TMP_IdsClmAllDel
